comments.author: Joe Oakhart
comments.body: Implemented. source dict plumbed through rebar.create_ticket/comment -> create_core/leaf.comment -> CREATE/COMMENT data; process_create/process_comment surface source_* additively (present-only). Schemas updated. Tests: tests/scripts/reducer/test_reducer_provenance.py (4) + tests/interfaces/contracts/test_provenance_roundtrip.py (2), all green. Full reducer+interfaces suites: 804 passed/9 skipped. ruff clean. Committed.

compiled_state.description:
# T1 — Provenance plumbing: carry source_* through the write path + surface in ticket_state

## Context

Foundation for P1.2 rebar→rebar migration (epic rule-swamp-pupil / ab74-b205-72af-4ce1).
Import must preserve original id/date/author/env as provenance WITHOUT injecting foreign
HLC timestamps. CREATE and COMMENT event payloads must be able to carry optional
`source_*` fields; the reducer must read them and surface them in `ticket_state`.
Public write APIs build event `data` internally (`_commands/composer.py:132-144`,
`_commands/leaf.py:57`), so the plumbing spans BOTH the composer/leaf write layer and
the reducer processors. Additive + forward-compatible (no new event types).

## What

- `src/rebar/_commands/composer.py` — `create_core` accepts optional `source_id`,
  `source_created_at`, `source_author`, `source_env`; when present, write them into the
  CREATE event `data`.
- `src/rebar/_commands/leaf.py` — the COMMENT leaf accepts optional `source_comment_id`,
  `source_author`, `source_created_at`; write into COMMENT `data` when present.
- `src/rebar/reducer/_state.py` — initial state seeds `source_*` keys (default None).
- `src/rebar/reducer/_processors.py` — `process_create` reads the four `source_*` from
  `data`; `process_comment` reads per-comment source fields onto the comment entry.
- `src/rebar/schemas/ticket_state.schema.json` + `common.schema.json` — document the new
  optional fields (ticket-level `source_*`; per-comment `source_*`).
- `src/rebar/reducer/_present.py` — ensure `public_state()` does NOT strip the new fields.

## Scope

In: the optional pass-through + surfacing only. Out: export/import modules (T2/T3),
any CLI surface. No behavior change when source_* are absent.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] CREATE event with `source_id`/`source_created_at`/`source_author`/`source_env` in
      `data` round-trips: `reduce_ticket` surfaces all four in `ticket_state`.
- [ ] COMMENT with per-comment source fields surfaces them on the comment entry.
- [ ] Absent source_* → fields are None/omitted; existing `ticket_state` output unchanged
      (no regression in the full test suite).
- [ ] `ticket_state.schema.json` / `common.schema.json` validate the new optional fields.
- [ ] New reducer test exercises CREATE+COMMENT provenance surfacing; `pytest` green.
compiled_state.title: T1 — Provenance plumbing: source_* through write path + ticket_state
